conditions: ratios is not empty, sum(ratios) > 0, amount >= 0
description: Checks if the input ratios are not empty, sum of ratios is greater than 0, and amount is non-negative

conditions: fee is applied per share instead of once
description: Identifies the bug where the fee is applied per share instead of once
Raises a ValueError if ratios is empty
Raises a ValueError if the sum of ratios is less than or equal to 0
Raises a ValueError if the amount is negative
Calculates the base donation payouts per ratio
Returns the final donation payouts after deducting the fee
